items.title: Cooper Flagg's historic scoring night can't get Mavericks a win
items.blurb: Cooper Flagg's historic scoring night can't get Mavericks a win — Cooper Flagg became the first teenager to score 50 points in an NBA game Friday. That wasn't enough to get the Dallas Mavericks a win.

items.title: NBA Highlights: Magic 138, Mavericks 127
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Magic 138, Mavericks 127 — Wendell Carter posted 28 points on 50 per cent shooting, while Desmond Bane added 27 points and three steals as the Orlando Magic earned a 138-127 win over the Dallas Mavericks. Cooper Flagg tallied a new career-high with 51 points in the loss.

items.title: Mavericks' Cooper Flagg was bound to make NBA history
items.blurb: Mavericks' Cooper Flagg was bound to make NBA history — Even during another loss for the Dallas Mavericks, rookie Cooper Flagg continued to make his debut season historic. The No. 1 overall pick from the 2025 NBA Draft put together a performance the league had never seen before.

items.title: Devin Booker Signs Two-Year, $145 Million Max Contract with Suns
items.blurb: Devin Booker Signs Two-Year, $145 Million Max Contract with Suns — On July 10, 2025, Devin Booker made NBA history by signing a two-year, $145 million max extension with the Phoenix Suns. items.blurb: ‘We can beat anybody’: Raptors’ Barrett confident ahead of Celtics matchup — RJ Barrett spoke to the media following the Toronto Raptors decisive win over the Memphis Grizzlies, saying they kept their foot on the gas from tip-off to final buzzer, adding that he’s eager to face the Boston Celtics in the team’s next matchup.

items.blurb: Kyshawn George Out For Season With UCL Tear In Elbow — Kyshawn George will miss the rest of the year with a Grade 2 ulnar collateral ligament in his left elbow, the Washington Wizards announced on Thursday. items.title: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday
items.blurb: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday —   Los Angeles Clippers guard James Harden entered Monday’s matchup against the Philadelphia 76ers needing just one point to reach a significant career milestone. The Clippers fell to Philadelphia in a closely contested game at the Wells Fargo Center on Tuesday, but Harden delivered 28 points along with six rebounds and five assists.

items.title: Trail Blazers fined $100K for contacting Yang Hansen before draft eligibility
items.blurb: Trail Blazers fined $100K for contacting Yang Hansen before draft eligibility — The NBA announced Wednesday that the Trail Blazers have been fined $100,000 for violating league rules governing contact with draft-ineligible players after scouting Hansen in Dec. 2023.
